main.description: List trees planted by an author. A planting is a root bud (depth 0) authored by `actor`; each entry reports the root AT-URI and the height of the tallest branch descended from it.

actor.description: DID of the author whose plantings to list.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a prior call.
Opaque pagination token for the next page. Absent when there are no more results.

root.description: AT-URI of the root bud the author planted.

treeHeight.description: Length of the longest root-to-leaf path in this tree (1 when the root has no children).
